responseText:
It’s already set to deliver to your Discord DM.

- Active schedules: `gold_rate_1min` (every 60s) and `gold_rate_2min` (every 120s), both with `--deliver discord`.
- Verify installed: `./scripts/schedule.sh list`
- Verify it’s sending: `tail -f ~/.tinyclaw/logs/discord.log` (look for `Sent proactive message...`)

If you only want one of them, tell me which to keep (`1min` or `2min`) and I’ll remove the other.
